---
title: "test_pennyone_search_empire.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/empire_tests/test_pennyone_search_empire.ts"
loc: 38
complexity: 2
logic_score: 5.65
style_score: 3.94
intel_score: 6.66
overall_score: 6.18
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.7/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [test](file://node:test)
- [describe](file://node:test)
- [*](file://node:assert)
- [*](file://node:fs/promises)
- [*](file://node:path)
- [searchMatrix](file://../../src/tools/pennyone/live/search.js)

### Exports
- `statsDir`
- `graphPath`
- `raw`
- `logs`
- `originalLog`
- `foundGateway`
- `logs`
- `originalLog`
- `noMatch`
